metadata.name: Set Up an Automated Welcome Email

description: An email marketer needs to create an automated workflow that sends a welcome email immediately after a new user signs up.

nodes.task_description: Create a new automated workflow in the email marketing platform.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent initiates the creation of a new automation.

nodes.task_description: Set the trigger for the workflow to be 'When a user joins the main mailing list'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly defines the entry condition for the automation.

nodes.task_description: Select the 'Welcome Email' template to be sent as the first step in the workflow.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent selects the correct email to be sent.
The welcome email workflow is now live and will trigger for new subscribers.
